questions: how to create and sell NFT art
answers: NFT art is digital artwork sold as Non-Fungible Tokens on a blockchain, providing proof of ownership and authenticity. Each NFT is unique and can be bought, sold, or traded on marketplaces.
NFT art holo blockchain e digital art token hisebe sell kora. OpenSea, Foundation, Rarible e art upload kore mint kora jay. Ethereum ba Solana e mostly hoy.

To sell NFT art: create your digital artwork, set up a crypto wallet (MetaMask), choose a marketplace (OpenSea, Foundation), upload and mint your art, set a price or auction. Gas fees apply on some chains.

The NFT market has cooled from its 2021 peak but still exists. Focus on building a community and creating genuine art rather than chasing hype. Some artists still earn well through consistent NFT drops.
